reply_content:
@JustRed17  😂😂😂
No, man, this whole thing is out of control. I respect the choices of every person on this earth (I am positive about the LGBT community) but to propagate a person's preference is not a nice thing. It's annoying. A reasonable man (as a species) is able to make his own choices, he doesn't need to be told what he should adhere to.
At the moment I'm *openly showing my dislike for propaganda (everyone should do that).* Because *instead of working on a work of art, these guys (from Netflix, for example) are busy IMPLEMENTING propaganda into their work.* This is inexcusable, because in this way, they destroy the universe of the work they are working on.
In short, *this is the modern problem of contemporary art.* In other words, a crisis, which is not good.

Alas.
